name: RIDGEFIELD ACQUISITION CORP
summary: PARTI . Ridgefield Acquisition Corp. (we, us, our, Ridgefield or the Company) was originally incorporated as a Colorado corporation on October13, 1983 under the name Ozo Diversified,Inc. On June23, 2006, the Company filed Articles of Merger with the Secretary of State of the State of Nevada that effected the merger between the Company and a wholly-owned subsidiary formed under the laws of the State of Nevada (RAC-NV), pursuant to the Articles of Merger, whereby RAC-NV was the surviving corporati...
